infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FarmLink uses your camera to scan crops and upload product images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FarmLink accesses your photos to upload product images.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FarmLink uses your location for delivery tracking and finding nearby farmers.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: FarmLink uses your microphone for voice messages and AI assistant.
